source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Friendly English UI with Japanese typography guidance for settings panels, compact preferences, table labels, command search, and status copy.
layout: Playful settings dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, plum primary controls, pink active states, lime success cues, leaf-grain texture, and woodland path neutral surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Oxalis motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: Morphous Oxalis transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a single isolated oxalis plant motif for a design-system catalog cutout.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: oxalis leaf and flower, with several triangular heart-shaped purple oxalis leaves, delicate five-petal pink flowers, tiny lime green stems and fresh leaf highlights, a minimal woodland path neutral root/stem base only.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, clean natural detail.
Composition/framing: centered full subject, generous padding on all sides, no cropping, no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: playful settings system mood, bright soft woodland-path light, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: purple oxalis leaves, pink flower petals, lime green stems/highlights, woodland path neutrals only; do not use cyan or #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: background must be one uniform #00ffff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges.
Avoid: pot, vase, hand, bouquet wrap, insects, landscape, text, watermark, extra decorative colors, shadows, reflections.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible transparent Oxalis motif image as the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Oxalis".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: playful settings system for woodland-path preference panels, dense but friendly operational UI, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: purple oxalis leaves, deep plum leaf shadows, pink flower petals, lime green stems and leaf highlights, woodland path soil/twig neutrals, warm off-white surfaces. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple-blue gradients, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "オキザリス", "設定パネル", "状態".
Components: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle triangular oxalis leaf grain, petal blush washes, lime stem tick marks, woodland path speckle dividers, twig-neutral borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no landing page or marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible transparent Oxalis motif and the visible Morphous Oxalis light board as source references for colors, texture, component coverage, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Oxalis" with the same playful settings-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: playful settings system for woodland-path preference panels, night-mode settings console, dense but friendly operational UI, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep purple oxalis leaf backgrounds, plum leaf shadows, pink flower active states, lime green stems and success highlights, dark woodland path soil/twig neutrals, muted lavender borders. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple-blue gradients, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "オキザリス", "設定パネル", "状態".
Components: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark triangular oxalis leaf grain, petal blush accent washes, lime stem tick marks, woodland path speckle panels, twig-neutral borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no landing page or marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.
